objective: Split shaders/3d_and_hypercomplex into behavior-owned subfolders: hypercomplex_escape_time owns 2D/sliced hypercomplex escape-time shaders; raymarched_volumes owns 3D/pseudo-3D and raymarched volume shaders referenced by the existing catalogs. Preserve shader behavior by moving files only and keeping existing pubspec/catalog shader asset references stable.
completedSlices: Moved six hypercomplex escape-time shaders into hypercomplex_escape_time: quaternion_julia_2d_gpu.frag, tessarine_julia_gpu.frag, split_complex_gpu.frag, dual_complex_gpu.frag, bicomplex_gpu.frag, hypercomplex_newton_gpu.frag.

Moved six 3D/pseudo-3D/raymarched shaders into raymarched_volumes: 3d_fractal_gpu.frag, quaternion_julia_3d_gpu.frag, dual_quaternion_julia_gpu.frag, mandelbox_shape_inversion_gpu.frag, mandelbulb_time_modulated_gpu.frag, mandelbox_3d_gpu.frag.
Verified all 12 moved shaders are byte-identical to their previous root paths; no shader source content changed.

Performed shared-code pass; identical linearToSRGB/rotationMatrix/palette helpers were found, but extraction was intentionally skipped because Flutter runtime-effect shaders currently have no local include/shared GLSL contract beyond flutter/runtime_effect.glsl and adding one would risk shader compilation behavior.
